action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP ViT-B/16 with 15 epochs achieved test balanced accuracy 0.5636, but validation balanced accuracy reached 0.877, indicating severe domain overfitting. Rare classes (bird 0.259, squirrel 0.091) are still very low. Analysis: Simple augmentation (MixUp alone) insufficient to close domain gap; class imbalance hurts rare species. Decision: Implement domain adversarial training (DANN) using provided domain labels, add weighted cross-entropy loss, heavier RandAugment, dropout, and train longer (30 epochs) with early stopping. Monitor improvement via eval submission.
